phrases.cultural_note: Piazzale Roma is Venice's main gateway by road — buses, taxis and the airport shuttle all terminate here.

responses.english: It's the terminus for all buses, it's right nearby.
responses.phonetic: eh eel kah-poh-lee-NEH-ah dee TOOT-tee ee boos, eh kwee vee-CHEE-noh.
responses.local: È il capolinea di tutti i bus, è qui vicino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the Alilaguna airport boat
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si prende l'Alilaguna per l'aeroporto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PREN-deh lah-lee-lah-GOO-nah per lah-eh-roh-POR-toh?

responses.english: At the Alilaguna jetty, outside Piazzale Roma.
responses.phonetic: al pon-TEE-leh ah-lee-lah-GOO-nah, FWOH-ree dah PYAHT-tsah-leh ROH-mah.
responses.local: Al pontile Alilaguna, fuori da Piazzale Roma.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a quiet campo for a rest
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un campo tranquillo qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon KAM-poh tran-KWEEL-loh kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: Campo San Giacomo dell'Orio, very peaceful.
responses.phonetic: KAM-poh san JAH-koh-moh del-LOH-ryoh, MOL-toh tran-KWEEL-loh.
responses.local: Campo San Giacomo dell'Orio, molto tranquillo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to leave luggage near Piazzale Roma
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un deposito bagagli vicino a Piazzale Roma?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon deh-POH-zee-toh bah-GAH-lyee vee-CHEE-noh ah PYAHT-tsah-leh ROH-mah?

responses.english: Yes, at Piazzale Roma itself, ground floor.
responses.phonetic: see, een PYAHT-tsah-leh ROH-mah STES-sah, PYAH-noh TER-rah.
responses.local: Sì, in Piazzale Roma stessa, piano terra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which vaporetto line goes along the Grand Canal from here
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale linea del vaporetto percorre il Canal Grande da qui?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh LEE-neh-ah del vah-poh-RET-toh per-KOR-reh eel kah-NAH-leh GRAN-deh dah kwee?

responses.english: Line one, from the jetty right outside.
responses.phonetic: lah LEE-neh-ah OO-noh, dal pon-TEE-leh kwee FWOH-ree.
responses.local: La linea uno, dal pontile qui fuori.
